name: Chocolate Chip Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Lightly spray or wipe two baking sheets with vegetable oil.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream the oil, sugar, egg and egg whites until smooth.
4. Add flour, soda and salt. Mix well.
5. Add the chocolate chips and mix gently.
6. Place dough in 1/2 teaspoon mounds on sheet.
7. Bake for 7 minutes or until brown.
